The '''Vestaari''' were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]]. There were known to be Vestaari nomads, one of which [[Abal Karda]] attempted to disguise himself as when fleeing Vestar.

{{Species-stub}}
